entries.title: Career Win
entries.text: Today I got promoted after weeks of prep. I felt proud, relieved, and excited about the next chapter at work.

entries.title: Missing Milo
entries.text: I am still grieving Milo. Losing my dog has made the apartment feel so quiet and heavy.

entries.title: Hard Meeting
entries.text: The meeting with the team was tense. I left frustrated and kept replaying the conflict in my head.

entries.title: First Day in Chicago
entries.text: Walking through a new city felt energizing. I loved exploring unfamiliar streets and small cafes.

entries.title: Running on Empty
entries.text: I have been exhausted from too many deadlines. The pressure is building and I feel worn out.

queries.text: feeling happy about a promotion at work
